name: Playback speed: Check of playback speed
fullName: Audiobook in Lyrasis: Playback speed: Check of playback speed
statusMessage: Current playback speed value is not correct on audio player screen
statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: Current playback speed value is not correct on audio player screen
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.audiobookSteps.AudioPlayerSteps.checkCurrentPlaybackSpeedValueIsCorrectOnAudioPlayerScreen(AudioPlayerSteps.java:208)
	at ✽.Current playback speed value is 0.75X on audio player screen(file:///home/runner/work/mobile-integration-tests/mobile-integration-tests/src/test/java/features/AudiobookLyrasis.feature:409)

testStage.statusMessage: Current playback speed value is not correct on audio player screen
testStage.statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: Current playback speed value is not correct on audio player screen
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)

	at stepdefinitions.audiobookSteps.AudioPlayerSteps.checkCurrentPlaybackSpeedValueIsCorrectOnAudioPlayerScreen(AudioPlayerSteps.java:208)

steps.name: Given  I add "LYRASIS Reads" account from welcomeScreen
Then  Account 'LYRASIS Reads' is present on Accounts screen
When  I enter credentials for 'LYRASIS Reads' account
Then  Login is performed successfully
When  I open Catalog
When  I open search modal
And  I search 'available' book of distributor 'Palace Marketplace' and bookType 'AUDIOBOOK' from "LYRASIS Reads" and save as 'bookNameInfo'
And  I switch to 'Audiobooks' catalog tab
And  Open AUDIOBOOK book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
And  Click GET action button on book details screen
Then  I check that book contains LISTEN action button on book details screen
When  Click LISTEN action button on book details screen
Then  Audio player screen of book 'bookInfo' is opened
When  Select 0.75X playback speed on playback speed audiobook screen
Then  Current playback speed value is 0.75X on audio player screen
steps.statusMessage: Current playback speed value is not correct on audio player screen
steps.statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: Current playback speed value is not correct on audio player screen
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.audiobookSteps.AudioPlayerSteps.checkCurrentPlaybackSpeedValueIsCorrectOnAudioPlayerScreen(AudioPlayerSteps.java:208)
	at ✽.Current playback speed value is 0.75X on audio player screen(file:///home/runner/work/mobile-integration-tests/mobile-integration-tests/src/test/java/features/AudiobookLyrasis.feature:409)

steps.name: When  Return to previous screen from audio player screen
And  Click LISTEN action button on book details screen
Then  Audio player screen of book 'bookInfo' is opened
And  Current playback speed value is 0.75X on audio player screen
When  I restart app
And  I open Books
And  Open AUDIOBOOK book with LISTEN action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo on books screen
And  Click LISTEN action button on book details screen
Then  Audio player screen of book 'bookInfo' is opened
And  Current playback speed value is 0.75X on audio player screen
When  Tap play button on audio player screen
And  Save book play time as 'timeAhead' on audio player screen
And  Wait for 8 seconds
Then  Playback has been moved forward by 6 seconds from 'timeAhead' seconds on audio player screen

labels.value: Playback speed: Check of playback speed
